items.caption: A copper piping system mounted on a metal frame with various components, including valves, gauges, and a control box. the system appears to be part of a heating or cooling apparatus, possibly for a large-scale industrial or commercial application. the text in the alt attribute suggests that the system is designed to address issues with oversized or improperly piped thermostatic water mixing valves.

An industrial setting with multiple metal structures, each featuring a complex network of copper piping and red valves. these structures are arranged in rows, with some having additional components like gauges and switches. in the foreground, there is a cardboard box on a metal platform, and the floor appears to be a concrete or similar industrial material. the background is a large, open space with a high ceiling and a few other industrial machines or equipment visible. the lighting is bright, suggesting an indoor environment with artificial lighting.
Detailed view of a yellow industrial gauge, circular dial on machinery.
items.creator: frank minjarez

items.caption: Close-up of industrial pressure gauge and valve mechanism with red paint and rust.
